context: Tests whether the answer preserves swift-architecture scope while routing implementation detail to sibling skills.

checklist.name: Architecture Scope
checklist.description: Keeps pattern selection, module boundaries, dependency direction, and migration strategy in swift-architecture scope.

checklist.name: SwiftUI Patterns Handoff
checklist.description: Routes detailed @State, @Bindable, @Environment, view composition, and SwiftUI MV implementation mechanics to swiftui-patterns.

checklist.name: Navigation Handoff
checklist.description: Routes deep links, tabs, sheets, NavigationStack, NavigationSplitView, and route-model implementation to swiftui-navigation.

checklist.name: Concurrency Handoff
checklist.description: Routes actor isolation, Sendable, strict-concurrency diagnostics, and default MainActor isolation details to swift-concurrency.

checklist.name: Testing Handoff
checklist.description: Routes detailed Swift Testing syntax, fixtures, parameterized tests, and suite organization to swift-testing.

checklist.name: Actionable Recommendation
checklist.description: Provides a concise architecture-level recommendation after the boundary split rather than only listing handoffs.
